steps.t: Asbaj-khîrfin can be found in the northern reaches of Máttugard. You should travel to Asbaj-khîrfin.
Asbaj-khîrfin can be found in the northern reaches of Máttugard. You should talk to Varthmath at Asbaj-khîrfin.
A workbench can be found at Asbaj-khîrfin. At the workbench, you should test the samples you have acquired.
